calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn Ane Mtn For Prove-Up Hearing; Memo Of P & A And Dec. Of Robert A Hartley And Pos
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. apecial appearance for plaintiff Global Acceptance Credit Company LP.
Plaintiff's request for waiver of live testimony was granted in court.
Declaration in support of the Default Judgment was submitted and reviewed by the court.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Igor Lyustin as follows:

Damages/Principal - $39,190.18
Prejudgment Interest - $13,521.66
Attorney's Fees - none
Costs - $469.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $53,180.84

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
